localize.text: Agents will have a minor increase to all stats when performing Work assigned by {0}.
Additionally, the following Asiyah research rewards now work as intended:
-Newly hired Agents have increased stats (on top of starting at Level 3)
Agents will have a minor increase to all stats when performing Suppression assigned by {0}.
Managerial Bullets have a small chance to consume no ammo when fired by {0}.
Additionally, the following Briah research rewards now work as intended:
-HP & SP Bullets heal an increased amount
-Slow Bullets (and other slowing effects) now effect Ordeals
The chance for Managerial Bullets fired by {0} to consume no ammo has increased.
Agents will have further increased stats while performing Work or Suppression ordered by {0}.
The previous stat boost has a small chance to become a permanent E.G.O Gift after {0}'s Assigned Work finishes. Agents who already have E.G.O Gift "Turing Test" will automatically gain this Gift.
